name: CSM Fault Data
description: The system status detected when a current sense event is detected.
comment: CSM Fault Data: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Cycle Names
description: The names of the "Selected Cycle" and the "Active Sub-Cycle." Each are exactly 10 ASCII characters, padded with ' ' (0x20).
comment: Cycle Names: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Leak Detected
description: Indication that the software has detected a water leak in the unit
comment: Leak Detected: Leak/moisture detection binary sensor.

name: Dispense Count
description: The number of soap dispenses in the life of the control.
comment: Dispense Count: Counter/count sensor.

name: PODS Count
description: The number of soap dispenses remaining until pod count reaches 0. This will decrement once per soap dispense and stop at 0.
comment: PODS Count: Counter/count sensor.

name: Dishwasher Usage Profile
description: Usage data accumulated over the life of the dishwasher

data.name: Wash Pump Run Time in Seconds
Drain Pump Run Time in Seconds
Water Valve Open Time in Seconds
Power Diverter Run Time in Seconds
Tub Light On Time in Seconds

comment: Dishwasher Usage Profile: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Water Temperature
description: The water temperature in Fahrenheit
comment: Water Temperature: Temperature in Fahrenheit.

name: Average Turbidity
description: The average turbidity in NTU
comment: Average Turbidity: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Dishwasher Door Status
description: The door status of the dishwasher
comment: Dishwasher Door Status: Door open/closed binary sensor.

name: Rinse Aid Level
description: The current state of the rinse aid sensor
comment: Rinse Aid Level: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Water Volume
description: The current water volume in hundredths of a gallon
comment: Water Volume: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Diverter Position
description: The current position of the water diverter
comment: Diverter Position: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Drain Pump Relay State
description: The current state of the drain pump relay
comment: Drain Pump Relay State: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Drain Pump Speed Percentage
description: The current drain pump speed expressed as a percentage
comment: Drain Pump Speed Percentage: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Water Valve State
description: The current state of the water valve
comment: Water Valve State: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Cycles Until Next Turbidity Calibration
description: The number cycles needed to be run before the turbidity sensor is calibrated again.
comment: Cycles Until Next Turbidity Calibration: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Turbidity Sensor Calibration Attempts
description: The number of calibration attempts performed on the turbidity sensor.
comment: Turbidity Sensor Calibration Attempts: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Circ Pump Speed Percentage
description: The current circulation pump speed expressed as a percentage
comment: Circ Pump Speed Percentage: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Heater Relay State
description: The current state of the heater relay
comment: Heater Relay State: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Fan 1 Speed Percentage
description: The current fan 1 speed expressed as a percentage
comment: Fan 1 Speed Percentage: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Fan 2 Speed Percentage
description: The current fan 2 speed expressed as a percentage
comment: Fan 2 Speed Percentage: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: System Software Versions
description: The software versions of all the boards in the dishwasher. If a board is not present in the system, the associated versions will be zero.
comment: System Software Versions: Version information sensor.

name: Dishwasher Rinse Aid Sensor Exists
description: Indicates whether or not a rinse aid sensor exists on the dishwasher

values.0: Rinse Aid Sensor Does Not Exist

comment: Dishwasher Rinse Aid Sensor Exists: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Dry Heater Temperature
description: Degrees F. The temperature of the air inside the unit, near the dry heater.
comment: Dry Heater Temperature: Temperature in Fahrenheit.

name: Dry Heater Fan Speed Feedback
description: Rpm. This is the measured speed feedback of the Dry Heater Fan.
comment: Dry Heater Fan Speed Feedback: Speed/RPM sensor.

name: Dry Heater Relay State
description: boolean. This is the status of the Dry Heater Relay, On or Off.
comment: Dry Heater Relay State: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Hue Score
description: The calculated hue score for the current cycle.
comment: Hue Score: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Tub Water Level
description: The current tub water level in mmH20
comment: Tub Water Level: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Flood Detected
description: Indicates if a flood is detected in the dishwasher.
comment: Flood Detected: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Enable Features
description: Specifies which cycle options are currently enabled.
comment: Enable Features: Multi-field boolean sensor, consider splitting into individual binary_sensors.

name: Remote Start Enable
description: The current state of the availability remote start
comment: Remote Start Enable: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Analog Door Latch AD Counts
description: Reports average ADC for each door state
comment: Auto-suggested: Analog Door Latch AD Counts

name: Turbidity Calibration Value
description: The DAC calibration value for the turbidity sensor
comment: Turbidity Calibration Value: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Rinse Aid Option State
description: The current state of the Rinse Aid Option State
comment: Rinse Aid Option State: Boolean writable switch.

name: Total AC Current Report
description: The sum of all AC currents being draw on the unit (inverter + non-inverter loads).
comment: Total AC Current Report: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Non-Inverter AC Current Report
description: The AC current being drawn by elements not controlled by the inverter.
comment: Non-Inverter AC Current Report: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Inverter AC Current Report
description: The AC current being drawn by elements controlled by the inverter.
comment: Inverter AC Current Report: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: DC Current Report
description: The DC current that is being drawn and the DC loads that are on.
comment: DC Current Report: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: AC Line Voltage
description: The voltage of the AC line as read by the inverter (volts)
comment: AC Line Voltage: Voltage sensor.

name: Door Pocket Light State
description: The current state of the door pocket light state
comment: Door Pocket Light State: Door open/closed binary sensor.

name: Demo Mode State
description: The current state of the Demo Mode state
comment: Demo Mode State: Boolean writable switch.

name: Critical Fault Status
description:
This is set to true when any critical fault is active that would be displayed on the Smart Assist Feature.
When this active, any cycles will be prevented from started or running.
comment: Critical Fault Status: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Noncritical Fault Status
description: This is set to true when any noncritical fault is active that would be displayed on the Smart Assist Feature.
comment: Noncritical Fault Status: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Smart Assist Cloud Notification Request
description:
Write to this ERD to set Smart Assist Cloud Notification. This controls the Smart Assist
LED on the dishwasher UI for cloud based notifications.
The status for this ERD is stored in 0x310D.
comment: Smart Assist Cloud Notification Request: Binary enum writable switch.

name: Smart Assist Cloud Notification Status
description:
Returns the status of the Smart Assist Cloud Notification.
Use ERD 0x310C to set the Smart Assist Cloud Notification.
comment: Smart Assist Cloud Notification Status: Binary enum read-only binary sensor.

name: Dish Feature Configuration
description: This is the feature configuration enabled on the appliance
comment: Dish Feature Configuration: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Preference Options Actual
description: Current preference options selected state.  Covers on/off settings, a rinse aid enum and 2 spare bytes for future options
comment: Preference Options Actual: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Preference Options Request
description: Request preference options selected state.  See 0x3201 for scope.
comment: Preference Options Request: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Tub1 1 Reminder
description: For 2nd entity Dishwasher: Remind user to do indicated action.
comment: Tub1 1 Reminder: Multi-field boolean sensor, consider splitting into individual binary_sensors.

name: Remote Control Command
description: Remote Control Commands
comment: Remote Control Command: Enum writable select.

name: User Settings Tub 1
description: Specifies the settings which are set by the user.
comment: User Settings Tub 1: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Error Tub 1
description: Indicates the last Fault/Error code that changed state -- either from inactive to active or from active to inactive
comment: Error Tub 1: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Cycle Counts Tub 1
description: Indicates how much times the cycle runs.
comment: Cycle Counts Tub 1: Counter/count sensor.

name: Water Softener Setting
description: This setting can be used for replenishment of a resin bed with salt. A softener setting of 0 means off, no regeneration.  A setting of 1 to 8 is selected depending on the water hardness as grouped by the following Mmol/l values: 0-1, 1.1-1.4, 1.5-1.7, 1.8-2.1, 2.2-2.8, 2.9-3.7, 3.8-5.3, 5.4-8.9.
comment: Water Softener Setting: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Water Softener Regeneration Frequency Setting Request
description: Request how often to dispense salt to regenerate the resin bed
comment: Water Softener Regeneration Frequency Setting Request: Enum writable select.

name: Auto Lid Down Setting
description:
This setting controls whether the drawer lids will open after a cycle has completed 
or remain closed.
comment: Auto Lid Down Setting: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Auto Lid Down Request
description: Request whether the drawer lids will open after a cycle has completed or remain closed.
comment: Auto Lid Down Request: Boolean writable switch.

name: Tub 1 Cycle Indication
description: For 2nd entity Dishwasher: Indicates the status of cycle.
comment: Tub 1 Cycle Indication: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Analog Inputs Tub 1
description: Indicates the status of analog input. It is generated based on Control Combined model.
comment: Analog Inputs Tub 1: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Cycle Definition 0
description: Cycle Definition 0 populated by the device
comment: Cycle Definition 0: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Cycle Definition 1
description: Cycle Definition 1 populated by the device
comment: Cycle Definition 1: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Cycle Definition 2
description: Cycle Definition 2 populated by the device
comment: Cycle Definition 2: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Cycle Definition 3
description: Cycle Definition 3 populated by the device
comment: Cycle Definition 3: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Cycle Definition 4
description: Cycle Definition 4 populated by the device
comment: Cycle Definition 4: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Cycle Definition 5
description: Cycle Definition 5 populated by the device
comment: Cycle Definition 5: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Cycle Definition 6
description: Cycle Definition 6 populated by the device
comment: Cycle Definition 6: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Cycle Definition 7
description: Cycle Definition 7 populated by the device
comment: Cycle Definition 7: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Cycle Definition 8
description: Cycle Definition 8 populated by the device
comment: Cycle Definition 8: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Cycle Definition 9
description: Cycle Definition 9 populated by the device
comment: Cycle Definition 9: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Delay Start Value
description: The current value of delay start setting. It has minute resolution delay time for the appliance with a max value of 720(12 Hrs).
comment: Delay Start Value: Single numeric writable value.

name: Selected Cycle Index
description: The current value of selected cycle index
comment: Selected Cycle Index: Single numeric writable value.

name: Wash Temperature Setting
description: The current state of Wash Temperature selection setting
comment: Wash Temperature Setting: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Heated Dry Setting
description: The current state of heated dry selection setting
comment: Heated Dry Setting: Enum writable select.

name: Wash Zone Selection
description: The current state of wash zone selection option
comment: Wash Zone Selection: Enum writable select.

name: Steam Option State
description: The current state of the Steam Option State
comment: Steam Option State: Boolean writable switch.

name: Bottle Blast Option State
description: The current state of the Bottle Blast Option State
comment: Bottle Blast Option State: Boolean writable switch.

name: UltraFresh Option State
description: The current state of the UltraFresh Option State
comment: UltraFresh Option State: Boolean writable switch.

name: Enable Features Tub 1
description: Specifies which cycle options are currently enabled.
comment: Enable Features Tub 1: Multi-field boolean sensor, consider splitting into individual binary_sensors.

name: Target Circulation Pump Speed
description: The current target circulation pump speed
comment: Target Circulation Pump Speed: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Target Drain Pump Speed
description: The current target drain pump speed
comment: Target Drain Pump Speed: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Actual Circulation Pump Speed
description: The current actual circulation pump speed
comment: Actual Circulation Pump Speed: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Actual Drain Pump Speed
description: The current actual drain pump speed
comment: Actual Drain Pump Speed: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Total AC Current Report
description: The Total AC Current being used by the unit
comment: Total AC Current Report: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Inverter Current Report
description: The Current reported by the unit's Inverter
comment: Inverter Current Report: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: DC Current Repot
description: The DC Current being used by the unit
comment: DC Current Repot: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Motor Identification Data
description: Motor identification data from the inverter as ADC counts. The inverter powers down in between cycles, and this ERD will update each time the inverter powers back on.
comment: Motor Identification Data: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Silverware Wash Option State
description: The current state of the Silverware Wash Option State
comment: Silverware Wash Option State: Boolean writable switch.

name: Custom Cycle Index Request
description:
This is used to request a custom cycle index from a client.
uiCycles <= index < totalCycles (these values are defined in ERD 0x3200). If the custom cycle has not been selected,
default value is 255.
comment: Custom Cycle Index Request: Single numeric writable value.

name: Custom Cycle Index Status
description:
This shows the current status of the cycle that is used when the custom cycle key is pressed on the dishwasher.
uiCycles <= index < totalCycles (these values are defined in ERD 0x3200). If the custom cycle has not been selected,
default value is 255.
comment: Custom Cycle Index Status: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Dish Favorite Settings Request
description:
Write to this ERD to store the cycle and options to be recalled by the favorites key 
on the dishwasher. The status can be read from ERD 0x322F.
Note: the bit 'validStoredSettings' indicates if valid settings are present and can be
recalled with the favorites key. Setting this to 0 marks the favorite data as invalid.
comment: Dish Favorite Settings Request: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Dish Favorite Settings Status
description:
Returns the cycle and options to be recalled by the favorites key on the dishwasher.
Use ERD 0x322E to update the settings.
comment: Dish Favorite Settings Status: Settings status, not user-facing.

name: Latched Key Status
description: This shows the latched pressed key status on the appliance
comment: Latched Key Status: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Default to Eco Cycle Setting
description:
This setting controls whether the product will default to running Eco cycle (for EU
energy compliance), or the last selected cycle. Must default to enabled for 
EU products.
comment: Default to Eco Cycle Setting: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Default to Eco Cycle Request
description: Request for whether the product will default to running Eco cycle, or the last selected cycle.
comment: Default to Eco Cycle Request: Boolean writable switch.

name: Tub1 Water Temperature
description: For 2nd entity Dishwasher: The water temperature in Fahrenheit
comment: Tub1 Water Temperature: Temperature in Fahrenheit.

name: Average Turbidity Tub 1
description: The average turbidity in NTU
comment: Average Turbidity Tub 1: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Tub 1 Dishwasher Door Status
description: For 2nd entity Dishwasher: The door status of the dishwasher
comment: Tub 1 Dishwasher Door Status: Door open/closed binary sensor.

name: Tub 1 Drain Pump Speed Percentage
description: For 2nd entity Dishwasher: The current drain pump speed expressed as a percentage
comment: Tub 1 Drain Pump Speed Percentage: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Tub 1 Circ Pump Speed Percentage
description: For 2nd entity Dishwasher: The current circulation pump speed expressed as a percentage
comment: Tub 1 Circ Pump Speed Percentage: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: System Software Versions Tub 1
description: The software versions of all the boards in the dishwasher. If a board is not present in the system, the associated versions will be zero.
comment: System Software Versions Tub 1: Version information sensor.
